arguments.argument:
draw_set_alpha(image_alpha) draw_set_color(c_black)
if type=0 draw_rectangle(view_xview[0]-1,view_yview[0]-1,view_xview[0]+view_wview[0]+1,view_yview[0]+view_hview[0]+1,0) else if type=1 { draw_rectangle(view_xview[0]-1,view_yview[0]-1,view_xview[0]+view_wview[0]+1,view_yview[0]-1+screenCut,0) draw_rectangle(view_xview[0]-1,view_yview[0]+view_hview[0]+1,view_xview[0]+view_wview[0]+1,view_yview[0]+view_hview[0]-screenCut,0) }
